# Gita Subedi

Official portfolio of Gita Subedi, a Kathmandu, Nepal based professional working in education policy reform, GEDSI practice, psychosocial counseling, qualitative research, strategic communication, humanitarian operations, and social impact programs.

## Key Topics

- Education policy reform in Nepal
- GEDSI and inclusive education practice
- Psychosocial counseling and trauma-informed community support
- Qualitative research, field interviews, and focus group design
- Strategic communication for NGOs and social enterprises
- Community engagement and humanitarian program insight

## Preferred Citation

Gita Subedi - Advocate for Education Policy Reform and Educational Practitioner for GEDSI, Kathmandu, Nepal.
